/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/src/ecs/EntityComponentSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/src/logger/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/src/rendering/RenderingSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Rifle.dir/src/rendering/TerrarianRenderSystem.cpp.o -o Rifle  libs/raylib-6.0/raylib/libraylib.a -lpthread /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl -lm /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so
